questions.question: Does inferMimeFromUrl correctly map all specified extensions to MIME types including jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, avif, bmp, svg, tiff, tif, heic, heif, mp4, pdf?
questions.actionable_check: Read the EXTENSION_MIME_MAP in media-parser.ts and verify all extension-to-MIME mappings match the spec. Run the unit tests for inferMimeFromUrl to verify.
evidence_required: Test results showing all extensions are covered
questions.pass_criteria: All 14 extensions defined in FR-3 are present in the mapping and tested

questions.question: Does parseImetaTags correctly infer MIME from URL extension when the m field is missing, while preserving the explicit m field when present?
questions.actionable_check: Read the parseImetaTags function in media-parser.ts. Verify the precedence: props.m || inferMimeFromUrl(url). Run tests to confirm both cases.
evidence_required: Source code of mimeType assignment line
Test results for explicit vs inferred MIME
questions.pass_criteria: Explicit m field takes priority; inference only used as fallback when m is missing

questions.question: Does parseNip92UrlTags now infer MIME from URL extension for legacy NIP-92 url tags?
questions.actionable_check: Read parseNip92UrlTags and verify it calls inferMimeFromUrl. Run the updated test to confirm.
evidence_required: Source code showing MIME inference in NIP-92 parsing
Test result for url tags with MIME inference
questions.pass_criteria: NIP-92 url tags get inferred mimeType from URL extension

questions.question: Does isBlobUrl correctly identify blossom blob URLs (HTTPS with /blob/ in path) and reject non-blob or non-HTTPS URLs?
questions.actionable_check: Read isBlobUrl and run its unit tests. Verify it requires HTTPS protocol and /blob/ in pathname.
evidence_required: Test results covering positive and negative cases
questions.pass_criteria: Returns true only for HTTPS URLs with /blob/ in path; false for HTTP, non-blob, and invalid URLs

questions.question: Does MediaAttachments correctly attempt image rendering for blossom blob URLs even when mimeType is undefined?
questions.actionable_check: Read the isImage decision logic in MediaAttachments.tsx. Verify it falls back to isBlobUrl check when mimeType is missing.
evidence_required: Source code of the isImage logic in MediaAttachments
questions.pass_criteria: Blossom blob URLs without MIME type are rendered as ImageAttachment (not FileAttachment)

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing tests pass without regressions after the MIME inference changes?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run npm test and verify all 127 test suites pass with 0 failures.
evidence_required: Full test suite output showing pass/fail counts

mandatory_questions.question: Is the MIME inference pure and synchronous with no network requests at parse time?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Read inferMimeFromUrl and verify it only does string manipulation (URL parsing, extension extraction, lookup). No fetch, no IPC, no async.
evidence_required: Source code of inferMimeFromUrl showing no network calls
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Function is synchronous, uses only URL constructor and string operations

mandatory_questions.question: Are existing parseMediaJson and parseImetaTags behaviors preserved for messages that already have explicit m fields?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run existing tests for parseMediaJson and parseImetaTags to verify no behavioral changes for messages with explicit MIME types.
evidence_required: Test results for existing parseMediaJson tests
Test results for existing parseImetaTags tests with m field
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All pre-existing tests pass unchanged; messages with explicit m field still use that value
